prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约5118名→4510名→4180名→3895名→3549名，呈持续前移态势，5年累计前移约1569名，年均前移约300–400名；2025年基准位次约3549名，为近年最高水平；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2022年均为69人，2023年增至71人，2024–2025年增至75人；2026年计划76人，较2025年小幅扩招1人（+1.3%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第37名，近年稳定在35–37名区间，属于顶尖211层次，综合实力接近中游985水平；2025年声誉偏正面：投档线稳步提升（从211第14名升至第3名），入选国家卓越工程师学院，保研率逐年提升至27%；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室安全事故），但整体关注度仍高；抖音热度评价为"一般"，综合热度排名第61位；投档异常信号为高关注，反映该校吸引力持续增强；拥有力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-等7个A类学科，航空宇航、力学、机械等王牌学科与招生专业高度匹配，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"，与南航优势学科方向高度吻合，持续吸引优质生源；吉林省2026年高考总人数110868人，估算物理类考生约80000人，较2025年80421人略有减少（约–0.5%），竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲趋势、2026年招生计划仅微扩1人、学校层次与声誉持续提升、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，预计2026年位次将继续前移但幅度放缓；在2025年基准3549名基础上，预测最低位次约3487名，区间2987–3987名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工程力学（钱伟长拔尖创新班）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程等）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、信息工程）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 自动化
- 低空技术与工程（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 能源与动力工程
- 探测制导与控制技术
- 应用物理学（应物加电子信息双学士学位）
- 智能飞行器技术
- 测控技术与仪器
- 微电子科学与工程（集成电路设计）
- 软件工程
- 交通运输（含空管、运输、电气、机场4个方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 机械工程
- 人工智能
- 机器人工程
- 信息安全
- 信息与计算科学
- 材料科学与工程
- 工业工程（智能制造与管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3487名，区间2987–3987名。位次在区间下限（2987名）附近可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（航空航天类、计算机、电子信息、电气等）；位次在区间中段（约3487名）建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（3987名）附近建议以三档保底为主，二档作为主力选择。南航优势学科集中，专业梯度清晰，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级合理搭配冲稳保。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Jilin Province were approximately 5118 → 4510 → 4180 → 3895 → 3549, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 1569 places over 5 years, averaging about 300–400 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3549, the highest level in recent years; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province was 69 students in 2021–2022, increased to 71 in 2023, and to 75 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 76 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+1.3%) compared to 2025, with a very small expansion rate, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 37th, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 level, with comprehensive strength close to mid-level 985 universities; in 2025, the reputation is positive: the admission score line has steadily increased (from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities), selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate recommendation rate has gradually increased to 27%; in 2026, the reputation is negative (laboratory safety incident), but overall attention remains high; Douyin heat evaluation is "average", with a comprehensive heat ranking of 61st; the abnormal admission signal is high attention, reflecting the university's continuously increasing attractiveness; it has 7 A-level disciplines: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with flagship disciplines such as aerospace, mechanics, and mechanical engineering highly matching the enrollment majors, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have a social heat rating of "highly recommended", highly consistent with NUAA's advantageous disciplines, continuously attracting high-quality students; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is 110,868, with an estimated 80,000 physics category candidates, a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025 (about –0.5%), slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous upward movement in historical rankings, the minimal expansion of only 1 student in the 2026 enrollment plan, the continuous improvement in school level and reputation, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, it is expected that the ranking will continue to move forward in 2026 but at a slower pace; based on the 2025 baseline of 3549, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3487, with a range of 2987–3987.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Mechanics (Qian Weichang Top Talent Innovation Class)
- Aerospace Engineering (Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Information Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Automation
- Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Detection, Guidance and Control Technology
- Applied Physics (Applied Physics plus Electronic Information Dual Degree)
- Intelligent Aircraft Technology
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Integrated Circuit Design)
- Software Engineering
- Transportation (including Air Traffic Control, Transportation, Electrical, Airport 4 directions).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence
- Robotics Engineering
- Information Security
- Information and Computing Science
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Industrial Engineering (Intelligent Manufacturing and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3487, range 2987–3987. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (2987) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Aerospace, Computer, Electronic Information, Electrical, etc.); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 3487) are advised to mainly choose Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a sprint; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (3987) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, with Tier 2 as the main choice. NUAA's advantageous disciplines are concentrated, and the major tiers are clear. It is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels to reasonably match sprint, stable, and safety choices.
